item.title: The Enterprise Blueprint: Migrating Legacy Word Documentation to Docs-as-Code
item.description: A technical guide on auditing, programmatically converting, and restructuring legacy Microsoft Word archives into automated Markdown pipelines.

item.title: Building a GitHub Portfolio: A Step-by-Step Guide for Technical Writers
item.description: Why traditional PDFs don’t cut it anymore, and how to engineer a high-performance portfolio using Hugo, PaperMod, and Markdown.

item.title: Product Release Notes & Version History Engineering
item.description: Designing user-centric release notes, changelogs, and version history frameworks for A11yInspect—BarrierBreak’s enterprise digital accessibility testing platform.

item.title: Maritime Enterprise Product Documentation Suite
item.description: Architecting end-to-end technical documentation, functional requirement specs, and user journeys for SKO Systems’ flagship maritime and cruise operations platform.

item.title: Enterprise Technical Content Strategy & Whitepapers
item.description: Architecting authoritative technical whitepapers on DevOps strategy, AI automation, Shift-Left security, and ETL testing pipelines to drive industry thought leadership.

item.title: About
item.description:
Welcome!

My name is Saurabh Kale, a Senior Technical Writer building documentation strategies that scale through docs-as-code architecture, team leadership, and emerging technologies.

My Toolkit

My current professional toolkit includes:

  • Docs-as-Code: Hugo, Markdown, Asciidoc, Sphinx, reStructured Text
  • Development: Git, GitHub, VS Code
  • AI & Automation: Claude Code, LLM-Assisted Content Strategy
  • Design & Collaboration: MS Visio, Camtasia, Snagit

Other Tools I’ve Used

  • Documentation Platforms: MadCap Flare, Confluence, Swagger, Postman
  • Project Management: Jira, Azure DevOps, SharePoint
  • Communication: Slack, WebEx, Zoom

This site uses:

Git, GitHub, Markdown, Hugo, and the PaperMod theme.

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Elevator Pitch

Senior technical writer building documentation strategies that scale through docs-as-code architecture, team leadership, and emerging technologies.

About Me

  • Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India (or Remote)
  • Class of Work: Full-time, Freelance, Contract
  • Type of Work: Developer Experience (DX) Documentation, API/SDK Reference Design, Information Architecture, Content Strategy
  • Desired Title: Senior Technical Writer, Documentation Architect, Content Strategist

Summary

Senior Technical Writer & Documentation Architect with 6+ years of experience transforming technical complexity into intuitive, actionable user journeys. Specialized in scaling documentation for high-growth environments, bridging the gap between engineering teams and end-users. Expert in docs-as-code automation, MSTP governance, and designing “Golden Path” onboarding experiences that reduce time-to-value for developers and enterprise stakeholders.
